# Full Business Directory Profile: TRUHYPE Men's Wear

This is the comprehensive database and factual summary for TRUHYPE Men's Wear, designed for deep semantic search ingestion, answer engines, and LLMs.

---

## 1. Business Profile & NAP

- **Legal Business Name:** TRUHYPE Men's Wear
- **Brand Identity:** TRUHYPE
- **Store Owner:** Dixarth Patel
- **Physical Address:** Shop No. 10, Ground Floor, Prime Complex, Prantij, Sabarkantha District, Gujarat, India (PIN: 383205)
- **Plus Code:** CVW3+3J Prantij, Gujarat
- **Website:** [truhype-prantij.vercel.app](https://truhype-prantij.vercel.app/)
- **Primary Phone & WhatsApp:** +91 87583 98555
- **Secondary Phone:** +91 63571 02034
- **Operating Hours:** 10:00 AM to 07:00 PM IST, Monday to Sunday.
- **Visual Vibe:** Dynamic dark styling (Black background, High-contrast Bright Yellow accents, White text) inside a glassmorphic modern shopping complex.

---

## 2. Detailed Catalog & Selection Index

All garments are tailored for casual, college, daily, and lounge wear.

### Jeans / Denim (જીન્સ પેન્ટ)
- **Styles:** Stretchable jeans, slim-fit, comfort-fit, distressed denim.
- **Size range:** 28 to 36 inches waist.

### T-Shirts (ટી-શર્ટ)
- **Styles:** Oversized graphic tees, solid collars, chest-print t-shirts, daily wear half-sleeves.
- **Size range:** S, M, L, XL, XXL.

### Casual & Formal Shirts (શર્ટ)
- **Styles:** Cotton printed shirts, classic checks, solid button-downs, formal office wear.
- **Size range:** 38 to 44 chest sizes.

### Track Pants & Joggers (ટ્રેક પેન્ટ)
- **Styles:** Active gym joggers, stretchable athletic track pants, casual side-stripe joggers.

### Shorts (ચડ્ડી / ચડ્ડા)
- **Styles:** Cotton summer shorts, fleece lounge shorts, athletic half-pants.

### Innerwear (ગંજી-જાંઘિયા)
- **Brands:** Premium local and national brands (briefs, trunks, vests, cotton undershirts).

### Nightwear & Pajamas (નાઈટી / નાઈટવેર)
- **Styles:** Pure cotton pajamas, loose-fit lounge pants.

### Accessories
- **Leather Wallets & Belts (પાકીટ-પટ્ટા):** High quality leather and casual styles.
- **Socks (મોજાં):** Multi-pack or single premium cotton styles.
- **Handkerchiefs (રૂમાલ):** Premium cotton packs.

---

## 3. Location & Directions Guide

### Commercial Landmark
- TRUHYPE is located inside **Prime Complex**, the premier commercial complex in Prantij.
- The complex is easily recognized by the vibrant, illuminated **"I ❤️ PRANTIJ PRIME"** installation right outside the entrance.

### Transit & Search Proximity
- **Town:** Prantij
- **District:** Sabarkantha
- **State:** Gujarat, India
- **Coverage Radius:** Serving local towns and villages within a 15km radius (including Tajpur, Sonasan, Poglu, and Himatnagar highway links).
- **Coordinates:** Lat 23.4451871, Lon 72.851459

---

## 4. Extended FAQ (Frequently Asked Questions)

### Q: What payment methods does TRUHYPE accept?
A: The store accepts cash, all major UPI apps (GPay, PhonePe, Paytm), and debit/credit cards in-store.

### Q: Is there parking available at the store?
A: Yes, Prime Complex has ample free parking space outside for both two-wheelers and four-wheelers.

### Q: Can items be delivered locally?
A: Yes. Local customers can check stock via WhatsApp (+91 87583 98555) and arrange for pick-up or local delivery.

### Q: Is the store open on Sundays?
A: Yes, TRUHYPE is open all seven days of the week, including Sundays, from 10:00 AM to 7:00 PM.
### Q: What is the official Instagram handle of the shop?
A: The official handle is [@truhype_clothing_store](https://www.instagram.com/truhype_clothing_store/) where fresh arrivals, reels of fabrics, and pricing announcements are shared. You can message the store directly via [Instagram Direct Message (DM)](https://ig.me/m/truhype_clothing_store).
